programme.title: The Devil You Know: A Punk Knows Where the Bodies Are Buried
programme.desc: Chad Nance investigates the background of a mentally-ill killer a punk rocker war veteran is forced to make a gut-wrenching decision.

programme.title: Abandoned: California Water Supply
programme.desc: Rick visits California to find out more about its water problems and what the future holds for the "Sunburned State."

programme.title: Jungletown
programme.desc: Interns challenge the purpose of their new community by asking whether they do more harm than good and what their money goes to.

programme.title: Jungletown
programme.desc: Jimmy shows off his jungle playground, but is challenged by interns worried about their environmental impact.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz hangs out at The Palms Hotel in a room worth $50K per night Trappy reviews a $10K leather jacket made for dogs.

programme.title: Most Expensivest
programme.desc: 2 Chainz and Lil Duval explore a weed supercenter in Vegas sitting down at a $100K table at Drai's Top Shelf Budtending and a smart weed grinder.

programme.title: It's Suppertime!
programme.sub-title: Cod Chow'Da, the Ultimate Winter Fuel
programme.desc: Inspired by childhood visits to Prince Edward Island in Canada, Matty prepares a East Coast cod chowder with plenty of flavor and love.

programme.title: It's Suppertime!
programme.desc: Don't get ambushed by cheap fajita nights ever again Matty hands over the reins to this regal Tex Mex classic with a tomahawk steak, grilled Mexican corn and all the fixins.
